trackedDelta: Added 1 tracked entry: bodo-glimt-cl-qualifying-2026-27 (Bodø/Glimt vs Union Saint-Gilloise, Champions League 3rd qualifying round 2026/27). Documented but deliberately HELD OFF THE BOARD — UEFA has not yet published the exact match day (4 vs 5 Aug first leg / 11 vs 12 Aug second leg) or kickoff time (draw was today). lastUpdated bumped 11:25Z -> 15:00Z. 26 tracked entries now (was 25).

failures: Minor (addressed): the TV 2 Play evidence URL initially pointed to a stale specific-match page (bodoe-glimt-sturm-graz) rather than the tie's own page; corrected to the generic 'UEFA Champions League, kvalifisering' section URL, since the 2026/27 Union SG tie has no dedicated TV 2 Play page yet (never invent a URL). Streaming claim (TV 2 Play holds Glimt's CL-qualifying) stands.

notes: Standard-tier Opus, Monday late afternoon (17:00 CEST), ~3.6h after the 11:25Z run (F1 Hungary qualifying) and ~7h after the large 07:45Z broad fan-out (TdF Femmes + Grand Chess Tour). Not a fresh full scout fleet — the board was rebuilt/re-verified only hours earlier — this run targeted the ONE fresh signal from the 14:30Z coverage-gaps.json.

PRIMARY VALUE — a real next-fixture recall gap for a catalog-covered entity, TRACKED (not boarded): BODØ/GLIMT in Champions League qualifying 2026/27. coverage-gaps.json (14:30Z) flagged it (NRK headline 'Bodø/Glimt møter Union Saint-Gilloise i Champions League-kvalifiseringen', matchCount 4) but the hourly scout had dismissed it as 'not a tracked high-priority team' — outdated reasoning, since WP-116 widened catalog.json to cover the Norwegian top clubs (Bodø/Glimt, Brann, Molde, Rosenborg) wholesale as tier2.teams. The board carried nothing for Glimt, so this was a genuine gap.

RESEARCH FINDINGS (own web search, multi-source): Draw held Mon 20 Jul (2026/27 CL third qualifying round, League Path). Bodø/Glimt (NOR) drawn vs R. Union Saint-Gilloise (BEL). Bodø/Glimt plays the FIRST leg AWAY (Brussels), second leg HOME (Aspmyra) — leg order confirmed by two independent sources (AP via dailygazette.com + sporten.com). Match window per the published UEFA calendar: first legs 4-5 Aug, second legs 11-12 Aug 2026. Norwegian rights CONFIRMED: TV 2 Play (TV 2 holds CL-qualifying rights; dedicated 'UEFA Champions League, kvalifisering: Bodø/Glimt' section on play.tv2.no) + local Avisa Nordland/Direktesport.

DELIBERATE HOLD (why no board event): UEFA has NOT published the exact match day (4 vs 5 / 11 vs 12 Aug) or kickoff time yet — the draw was only today. Guessing a specific day/time for a high-profile, easily-checked Champions League fixture is exactly the wrong-time risk the prompt warns against ('a missing event is better than a wrong one'). This is consistent with the board's established discipline of holding date/time-unconfirmed football matches (Barça Joan Gamper, Ruud Montreal). The tie is fully documented in tracked.json with provenance + TV rights; verify (daily) and the next research run will pin the exact day+kickoff the moment UEFA publishes it and board both legs then.

OTHER catalog Norwegian clubs (Brann/Molde/Rosenborg — also tier2.teams) may have 2026/27 European qualifiers too, but the fresh RSS signal surfaced only Bodø/Glimt's tie; their gap-headlines (contracts/incidents) were not fixtures, and web search for the current season returned mostly stale 2025/26 results. Flagged for a future broad sweep, not deep-dived this run (budget/time discipline).

REST OF BOARD unchanged and current (built/verified within the last 7h): TdF men finishing (etappe 16 tempo Tue 21 Jul -> Paris Sun 26 Jul), F1 Hungary quali+race, CS2 (both 100 Thieves matches Wed 22 Jul), golf 3M Open, TdF Femmes 9 stages (1-9 Aug), Grand Chess Tour Saint Louis, athletics NM Trondheim + EM Birmingham, Lyn OBOS fixtures, Barcelona. scout-log 'quiet' (post-World-Cup wrap-up, past-tense results, transfer gossip). No board events added -> events.json untouched; validate-events.js: 58 events, 0 errors (2 benign multi-day chess timezone-bleed warnings).
